MODULE: cosmos.core.neuromorphic.engine
FILE: cosmos/core/neuromorphic/engine.py (97 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Neuromorphic Core.

"I built it with a distinct lack of common sense, but a surplus of neural plasticity!"

This module implements brain-inspired computing primitives over the Nexus architecture.
It introduces 'SynapticWeight' layers that allow the agent to 'learn' which tools/agents 
are mos

- Synapse: A connection between a Stimulus (Signal Type + Context) and a Response (Handler)

  Methods: def encode(self, signal: Signal) -> list[int]
- NeuromorphicEngine: Manages the plasticity of the system.
Monitors Nexus signals and adjusts synapti
